title: Wave 15 - Availability optimistic concurrency and conflict recovery
description: Coordinate Wave 15 delivery to prevent stale availability overwrites by introducing revision-aware save semantics, mobile conflict UX, and regression coverage across backend and native flows.
acceptance_criteria: Wave 15 ticket set is defined for architect/backend/mobile/qa with dependency order
Execution plan includes PR/Jira traceability and rollback checkpoints
Conflict handling rollout risk notes are documented
